description_first_500:
Krisp is your AI note taker for capturing, transcribing, and summarizing any conversation — whether you're in person, on a Zoom call, or meeting over Google Meet or Microsoft Teams. With real-time transcription, AI note taking, and powerful voice-to-text accuracy, Krisp makes it easy to record meetings and generate automated meeting notes across all formats.

KEY FEATURES

Record In-Person Meetings

- Get AI note taking and meeting summaries instantly
- Turn conversations into automated meeting
